| We beat Trump’s election-rigging scheme once. California Democrats passed Prop 50 by a landslide — stopping Trump and Republicans from stacking the deck and proving that when we organize, we win. **But in a new decision this morning, the Supreme Court just handed them a second chance.** By gutting the Voting Rights Act, Trump’s justices have opened the door to rig congressional maps across the country — specifically diluting Black, Latino, AANHPI, and Native American representation and locking in Republican power before a single vote is cast in 2026. Republicans are already preparing to redraw maps and push new voter suppression laws. Here in California, we’re facing a voter ID ballot measure designed to silence voters at the ballot box. **[We stopped them once with Prop 50. We can do it again. But only if we act immediately. clean_body: A second chance to rig 2026 | = | We beat Trump’s election-rigging scheme once. California Democrats passed Prop 50 by a landslide — stopping Trump and Republicans from stacking the deck and proving that when we organize, we win. But in a new decision this morning, the Supreme Court just handed them a second chance. By gutting the Voting Rights Act, Trump’s justices have opened the door to rig congressional maps across the country — specifically diluting Black, Latino, AANHPI, and Native American representation and locking in Republican power before a single vote is cast in 2026. Republicans are already preparing to redraw maps and push new voter suppression laws. Here in California, we’re facing a voter ID ballot measure designed to silence voters at the ballot box. = = Let’s be clear about the stakes: ✔️ When we passed Prop 50, we proved that grassroots organizing can stop election rigging in its tracks. ❌ If we don’t respond now, Republicans will use this Supreme Court ruling to rig maps nationwide and tilt the playing field before campaigns even begin. There is no waiting this out. The other side is moving fast to take advantage of this decision. They’re counting on us to be discouraged and distracted. But we are NOT going to be distracted. We are going to defeat the GOP’s attempts to suppress voters with voter ID requirements in California, expand our voter protection efforts to ensure every eligible voter can cast their ballot, and scale grassroots organizing to compete in key House races and retake the majority in 2026. = = = = = = Thank you so much, \- CADEM HQ | | = Our Democratic leaders are working hard to make California a better place to live. From fighting for good-paying jobs, combating climate change, to expanding healthcare access so all Californians can lead safe, healthy, prosperous lives — California’s Democratic leaders turn progressive ideas into meaningful action. name: Supervisor David Canepa
subject: Urgent: Help Us Reach Our May 1st Goal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Canepa for Assessor-County Clerk-Recorder 2026 committee, ID #1486383**
body:
| | | | [ ](https://us.list-manage.com/qZ5YuJ4XL4k?e=c0babbc643&c2id=bfcaacdd1ef4033edfed3d4b1d472a02)
---
| | | Dear Friend, The May 1st deadline is critical to ensuring we have the resources to communicate our message and reach voters before the election. If you’re able, please consider making a contribution today: [DONATE NOW](https://us.list-manage.com/IAuGCe8c4QN?e=c0babbc643&c2id=bfcaacdd1ef4033edfed3d4b1d472a02) As a proud fourth-generation San Mateo County resident with over 20 years of public service, I’m running for Assessor-County Clerk-Recorder and Chief Elections Officer to modernize this office and restore confidence in how it serves our community. A prior review made it clear that stronger leadership, greater transparency, and improved trust are needed, and I’m ready to deliver. As a former Mayor and current member of the Board of Supervisors, I oversee a $5.5 billion organization with 5,800 employees and strong financial reserves. I understand that accountability, sound management, and collaboration are essential to delivering reliable public services. As your Chief Elections Officer, I will ensure elections are secure, efficient, and accessible to all eligible voters, while strengthening transparency and public trust. This is an important moment for our county. With your help, we can build the momentum needed to win. name: Roger Lau
subject: Here’s the game plan, Derek:
body:
---
| [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-eom-april-2026?amount=7&refcode=em_20260429_6920_fr&refcode2=6920_22930333_oaoSr1&akid=6920%2E22930333%2EoaoSr1)
---
Derek, it’s Roger, the DNC’s Executive Director.
In a moment, I’m going to ask you to chip in $7 to the DNC. But first, I want to give you a quick update on our progress this month, and what comes next.
* To level-set: We need to flip FOUR Republican-held Senate seats and THREE Republican-held House seats to take back Congress.
* Here’s what that means: We need to win in states like Texas, North Carolina, Ohio, and Alaska — all states that Trump won in 2024.
* Here’s what the DNC is doing: Hiring hundreds of organizers who will register hundreds of thousands of new Democrats in battleground states like the ones I just mentioned, investing in state parties and campaigns, and taking the Trump administration to court to protect your right to vote.

To sum it up: _**We’re building the largest midterm operation in DNC history — and it’s not going to be easy, but we’re going to win the midterms. The future of our democracy depends on it._**
That’s why we need your help, Derek. Building a movement this large is _expensive_. It will take literally hundreds of thousands of Democrats just like you, volunteering their time and giving what they can.
**My team carefully calculates fundraising goals every month to make sure that we’re on track to win, and right now we’re pacing to fall just short of our $600K goal. So I have to ask:** [**If this work matters to you, please chip in $7 to the DNC today to help us meet our critical goal. We’ll put your donation to work immediately to help elect Democrats up and down the ballot and across the country.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-eom-april-2026?refcode=em_20260429_6920_fr&amount=7&refcode2=6920_22930333_oaoSr1&akid=6920%2E22930333%2EoaoSr1)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._

name: Team Chris Pappas
subject: New Hampshire is the key to the Senate
body:
[ https://act.chrispappas.org/go/126?t=1001&akid=6397%2E582294%2EVd_KHm ]Chris Pappas for Senate[ https://act.chrispappas.org/go/126?t=1002&akid=6397%2E582294%2EVd_KHm ]Chris Pappas for Senate

Have you
seen this?

“The Democrats’ road to a US Senate Majority runs through New England.”

[ https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260429_3.6HZm3N&refcode=em20260429-3&t=1003&akid=6397%2E582294%2EVd_KHm ]The Democrats' road to a US Senate Majority runs through New England.

What we
do here in New Hampshire determines the direction of our country for years
to come.

We have no chance to flip the Senate without holding onto New Hampshire.
And with polls showing John Sununu and Chris Pappas neck-and-neck in this
race, we need to step up our game right now.

We’re being outspent by the GOP, and we risk being drowned out on the
airwaves. That could seriously halt our momentum as this race ramps up. So
we are reaching out to our strongest supporters to ask:

[ https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260429_3.6HZm3N&refcode=em20260429-3&t=1004&akid=6397%2E582294%2EVd_KHm ]Please, chip in
$5 or whatever makes sense to you before our end-of-month
deadline so we can keep New Hampshire blue and take back the Senate.

Thanks for all that you do,

Team Pappas

name: Team Katie Porter
subject: Unlike other candidates, Katie will never compromise her values
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
We need to ensure Katie’s affordability message reaches far and wide before voters return their ballots.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=41241%2E3422442%2E3q4beC)
Peter,
Tomorrow marks our final end-of-month deadline before votes start being cast in this race.
We need to ensure Katie’s affordability message reaches far and wide before voters return their ballots.
**[We set a goal to raise $100,000 before our deadline so we have the resources we need to turn out voters. Can you rush $5 to help get us there?](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260429_3_ak.iURj2G&refcode=em20260429-41241&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=41241%2E3422442%2E3q4beC)**
[Donate ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260429_3_ak.iURj2G&refcode=em20260429-41241&t=4&akid=41241%2E3422442%2E3q4beC)
Running in California is expensive. While Katie has never taken a dime of corporate PAC money and relies on grassroots donors, our opponents can’t say the same.
Xavier Becerra took the maximum contribution possible—nearly $40,000—from an oil company. Tom Steyer made his billions by investing in Big Oil and other polluters, and is using it to fund his campaign with over $147 million.
You can bet those contributions are helping them reach their goals. Katie will never compromise her values, so we’re counting on grassroots donors to fuel this campaign.
**[So, Peter, can we count on you to donate $5 or more before tomorrow’s end-of-month deadline to help us reach our $100,000 goal?](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260429_3_ak.iURj2G&refcode=em20260429-41241&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=41241%2E3422442%2E3q4beC)**
[Donate ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260429_3_ak.iURj2G&refcode=em20260429-41241&t=24&akid=41241%2E3422442%2E3q4beC)
Thank you,
Team Katie Porter

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20260429-41241&amounts=&t=25&refcode2=41241_3422442_3q4beC&akid=41241%2E3422442%2E3q4beC)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4g-unsubscribe?source=41241&t=27&akid=41241%2E3422442%2E3q4beC)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Governor 2026
PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)

name: Oregon GOP
subject: 🚨 Stop the $4.3 Billion Tax Increase— Vote NO on Measure 120
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE OREGON REPUBLICAN PARTY (FEC COMMITTEE ID C00153031)
body: | | | | Oregon Republicans urge a NO vote on Measure 120 and returning ballots by May 19. --- --- Dear Patriot, Oregon Republicans are urging voters across the state to **vote NO on Measure 120** and return their Primary Election ballots by May 19. Measure 120 would impose a **massive $4.3 billion tax increase** —raising gas taxes, increasing vehicle registration and title fees, and doubling payroll taxes for public transit. If passed, Oregon’s gas tax would rise from 40 cents to 46 cents per gallon—among the highest in the nation. At a time when families are already feeling the pressure of rising costs, this measure would make life even more expensive for working Oregonians, commuters, seniors, and small businesses. --- **Key facts:** • $4.3 billion tax increase • Higher gas taxes and vehicle fees • Increased payroll taxes for transit • Ballots due May 19 --- We believe Oregonians deserve accountability, affordability, and responsible leadership—not another massive tax burden. 👉 Take action now: Vote NO on Measure 120. Return your ballot by May 19. --- | [Learn Why to Vote clean_body: | | | | Oregon Republicans urge a NO vote on Measure 120 and returning ballots by May 19. Dear Patriot, Oregon Republicans are urging voters across the state to vote NO on Measure 120 and return their Primary Election ballots by May 19. Measure 120 would impose a massive $4.3 billion tax increase —raising gas taxes, increasing vehicle registration and title fees, and doubling payroll taxes for public transit. If passed, Oregon’s gas tax would rise from 40 cents to 46 cents per gallon—among the highest in the nation. At a time when families are already feeling the pressure of rising costs, this measure would make life even more expensive for working Oregonians, commuters, seniors, and small businesses. Key facts: • $4.3 billion tax increase • Higher gas taxes and vehicle fees • Increased payroll taxes for transit • Ballots due May 19 We believe Oregonians deserve accountability, affordability, and responsible leadership—not another massive tax burden. 👉 Take action now: Vote NO on Measure 120. Return your ballot by May 19. | "" | Every vote matters—return your ballot today and help stop this tax increase. For Oregon, Connie Whelchel Chair, Oregon Republican Party Stay up to date with the latest campaign updates and Oregon news by following us on social media! | | | | | We are dedicated to promoting conservative values, protecting individual freedoms, and building a prosperous future for all Oregonians. name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Fight Back Against Hollywood's Agenda with Iggy and Mr. Kirk
body:
Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love.

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue’s Clues_...
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zr57mqthos9d94jpnp0627u7dpfi76fu5rg9rlrg_rp22sh2s8i6epr7clgmcoj6cth2bs)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. **[Today, I’m inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztd8vkd5rdq5ml3cs950vb8vs3civav2btej0230_rp22sh2s8i6epr7clgmcoj6cth2bs)** Introducing: _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you’ve seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television.
---
>> Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production.**_
---
I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That’s why I’m asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $250,000 for Season 2.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7libtbb7c9ffcug09lhp930u0ptdssurqkkb13g_rp22sh2s8i6epr7clgmcoj6cth2bs) ** As our special “Thank You” for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ FREE on DVD.This exclusive _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpttg9spmqsl9s7tr3vs4o5r1oovtqavdgimorl0_rp22sh2s8i6epr7clgmcoj6cth2bs)** , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. **[So please – whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zk883kuv62pduj2j88krokvnriti1ldgu741v4o0_rp22sh2s8i6epr7clgmcoj6cth2bs)** There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbheiik202e1qf6kt51psg3mjbps44tednk8b09o_rp22sh2s8i6epr7clgmcoj6cth2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4f6oi6tj1iebbp1asfouj912122dchejanskud0_rp22sh2s8i6epr7clgmcoj6cth2bs)
---
**Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)** **Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|
---
| | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in _history_ made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. **[Please send in your Founding Supporter gift and help me reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6opf0505bpg5vnl8dolknalmn88rbt7pvrb9h58_rp22sh2s8i6epr7clgmcoj6cth2bs)** Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk
---
[ **DONATE **](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9hbvjpactspjj55d4lq7n17j9o4pn5umgg77fh0_rp22sh2s8i6epr7clgmcoj6cth2bs)
---
| | **Brave Books** 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304
---
| | Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.
---

Pop Acta Media | American Action News
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

body:
We need you! No images? [Click here](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-e-akrca-hhlljjcji-j/) [Click Here to Fill out the Volunteer Form](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail20.com/t/y-l-akrca-hhlljjcji-r/) Good afternoon,In less than two months, Hoosier Republican delegates will gather in Fort Wayne (June 19th-20th) to nominate our party's candidates, adopt our party's platform, and set a course for our party's future!In preparation for this summer's State Convention, we are putting together a team of more than 100 volunteers! With thousands of delegates and attendees, no State Convention would be possible without the work of committed volunteers.If you are available and interested in taking part in this year's State Convention as a volunteer, please fill out the form below. While we cannot provide hotel rooms, meals will be provided, and volunteers will have access to our hospitality suites!While we will try to accommodate everyone who desires to volunteer, please wait for a member of our team to reach out and confirm your spot.This will be a statewide effort, and we deeply appreciate any support you can offer in finding committed Republicans to help us put on a successful State Convention.Very best,

name: Senator Tom Willis
subject: A Letter to West Virginia Voters - From the Wife of Senator Tom Willis
body:
| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/1b09514d4516/a-letter-to-west-virginia-voters-from-the-wife-of-senator-tom-willis?e=a0285cc040)
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
|
---
| |

**Dear Fellow West Virginians,** Have you heard the true story about Tom Willis? My name is Sara Willis, and I’m writing to you not as part of a campaign—but as a wife who has had a front-row seat to the life, character, and calling of the man now running for the United States Senate. You may know Tom as a U.S. Senate candidate, a current State Senator, a business owner, or a Green Beret. But I want you to know the man I know. First, I’ll tell you something lighter—Tom has a great sense of humor. He’s famous in our house for his “dad jokes,” most of which are so bad our oldest daughter can’t help but laugh anyway. That’s part of who he is—steady, grounded, and never taking himself too seriously. But more importantly, **Tom is the most consistent person I’ve ever known**. He is the same man in public as he is at home. And he never quits. Our family has walked through hardships. We lost our son, Hunter, after a long and difficult battle with cancer. I watched Tom walk that road as a father—with strength, faith, and a quiet courage that never wavered. He faithfully led our family and held our son’s hand every step of the way. I had always known Tom was strong. He graduated from U.S. Army Special Forces training as a Distinguished Honor Graduate. He has led soldiers in some of the most dangerous places in the world.
But it was in those hardest moments at home that I saw just how deep his strength truly runs. **Tom doesn’t run from difficult fights—he leans into them.**
He has spent more than two decades serving our country in uniform, fighting terrorism and defending freedom. And in the State Senate, he has continued that same mission—standing firm for what is right, even when it’s not easy or popular.
Tom is a man of deep faith. He lives it out every day—not just in words, but in how he leads our family, how he treats others, and how he makes decisions. He is actively involved in our church and believes deeply that faith and service go hand in hand.
He is not perfect—but he is accountable. He surrounds himself with people who speak truth into his life, and he listens. That humility is part of what makes him a strong leader.
Tom cares deeply about the future of West Virginia. We have been so blessed to raise our family here, and like so many of you, we want our children—and future generations—to have the opportunity to stay, work, and build a life right here at home.
He is running for the United States Senate because he believes West Virginia deserves strong, principled leadership in Washington—leadership that will fight for our values, protect our freedoms, and put our state first.
I have seen his heart. I have seen him tested. And I can tell you with complete confidence:
**Tom will stand for what is right—no matter the cost.**
That is the same commitment he has shown to me and our family for over 15 years. And it is the same commitment he will bring to serving you.
That is why I am asking you to join me in supporting my husband, Tom Willis, in the upcoming Republican Primary.
Your vote, your support, and your prayers mean more than you know.
**Warm Regards,**
Sara Willis

---
|
---

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Dear Fellow West Virginians, Have you heard the true story about Tom Willis? My name is Sara Willis, and I’m writing to you not as part of a campaign—but as a wife who has had a front-row seat to the life, character, and calling of the man now running for the United States Senate. You may know Tom as a U.S. Senate candidate, a current State Senator, a business owner, or a Green Beret. But I want you to know the man I know. First, I’ll tell you something lighter—Tom has a great sense of humor. He’s famous in our house for his “dad jokes,” most of which are so bad our oldest daughter can’t help but laugh anyway. That’s part of who he is—steady, grounded, and never taking himself too seriously. But more importantly, Tom is the most consistent person I’ve ever known. He is the same man in public as he is at home. And he never quits. Our family has walked through hardships. We lost our son, Hunter, after a long and difficult battle with cancer. I watched Tom walk that road as a father—with strength, faith, and a quiet courage that never wavered. He faithfully led our family and held our son’s hand every step of the way. I had always known Tom was strong. He graduated from U.S. Army Special Forces training as a Distinguished Honor Graduate. He has led soldiers in some of the most dangerous places in the world. But it was in those hardest moments at home that I saw just how deep his strength truly runs. Tom doesn’t run from difficult fights—he leans into them. He has spent more than two decades serving our country in uniform, fighting terrorism and defending freedom. And in the State Senate, he has continued that same mission—standing firm for what is right, even when it’s not easy or popular. Tom is a man of deep faith. He lives it out every day—not just in words, but in how he leads our family, how he treats others, and how he makes decisions. He is actively involved in our church and believes deeply that faith and service go hand in hand. He is not perfect—but he is accountable. He surrounds himself with people who speak truth into his life, and he listens. That humility is part of what makes him a strong leader. Tom cares deeply about the future of West Virginia. We have been so blessed to raise our family here, and like so many of you, we want our children—and future generations—to have the opportunity to stay, work, and build a life right here at home. He is running for the United States Senate because he believes West Virginia deserves strong, principled leadership in Washington—leadership that will fight for our values, protect our freedoms, and put our state first. I have seen his heart. I have seen him tested. And I can tell you with complete confidence: Tom will stand for what is right—no matter the cost. That is the same commitment he has shown to me and our family for over 15 years. And it is the same commitment he will bring to serving you. That is why I am asking you to join me in supporting my husband, Tom Willis, in the upcoming Republican Primary. Your vote, your support, and your prayers mean more than you know. Warm Regards, Sara Willis | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright (C) 2026 Tom Willis Victory. All rights reserved.

body:
The Supreme Court on Wednesday [struck down Louisiana's House map](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLHOozAQhJ_GdI6MMZAULq6hy7VXIsdew-aMF9lLIt7-xL3C34000qeZ789zfjpMmJffbgPLkeYM35qAGcq8QCnn5nKAUrkc_m-gbz4ixVkrPUhlZKfm4DCds2mCjQAaugZsO45jb7petc1qg1Ewuvt4DyYMRrfBPHzoXRzCa1Dw0A3ai6ZMp1qlTH-_GQ-m07H1UQ0vPbyEURCQqdzehJlXiOmkD5Sbp61JdmXeq-h-CT0JPeVzp8pXJfR0gYWelLnyQ-jpqPL6J_RUj73ABtLTUVgy1QpVJjqwostOrnRUkJvbJWa5uTcV-SHGvMiCy8pVOs8ygMeKlIWemmLD_sWUsA6jMGrZHKb_A_lHVj9W_wsAAP__BHmNZg) by a 6-3 vote, clearing a path for GOP redistricting gains across the South.

# Thursday, April 30, 2026
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1789, [George Washington](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DGunTAQheHVmM5oMAZu4yIN3UubEhk8NpMYG43NRew-ulF28OpPOjr6f30tX5YipfDTHmiqz0vCu0SsFXkJyPwcNjnkUvna_rh8p8tnvyhQowQte1icpfgsunHGIyrsGzTdNE2D7gfomt1YHLxVfsUNAFCrzvsJp-710gDb6seGzGcNdA8dgB5erd5Q98p3m4dxVeMqNKCjmrn9nSnVHX188hu53fLRRLPXehbR_xBqFmq-77vdqdTMz8eFmutORTr7SEryvwg125Mpyh6EmgNmDihvW3ZKoeYkA72xSE9cqjwZCzlMlWyUlOwVLrZRWucYS2nYuPOmGKmMk9AQDkvx37H6rZpvo_4GAAD__-QCjbI) was sworn in as the first U.S. president and delivered his inaugural speech at Federal Hall in New York City, establishing traditions that have largely remained unchanged for two centuries. Pluto was a planet for 76 years before astronomers demoted it in 2006. Now [NASA's chief wants to put it back](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLtu5CAUhp_G7s4IA_ZsCopt3GXbLa0zcDAn4WIBM5bffpVo3yD1f9Gn7-_79o4cOe9_MJHpvmyZzhapd6rbTrVeCbOj2np92k9Xzvz0xW9SyAWEBiU2hxyvTY_OeCJJaiQz3e_3WatZTGMwdpmtXpAeGidy6JUjcn6exNvbrAj1yObrTWglJiH0_OumLWkl_WS9WB5yeQxakONe6u2jcO6BfLzKi-rNljRGE3o_2qB-D3Id5Hqe560daOkrHeSKrdeSS7oGuR7x2csg14wNwQYmDx9YyQE3RJswQ8OrQaAGnvfQOe_gS4XvHTBgghfVC9LTBuAMPRBYTAcUDwk_6X8R4YiYqQPuyHmsxh0nx8htuQ9a7Ak5fqP3H_l-GfkvAAD__7CqmbY), as we report below. Planet or not? Reply to this email and let us know. Our [2026 Mother's Day Gift Guide](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DFy6yAUheHVQGfPhQvIKihe486vTckgcZFIkPAgZI12n3GaLCD1OfMV_8fDPXzKaZ3--4Vsi8WtdGyZWqPqJqr1XPwaqG6t7uNXKMe6xxKdBGkuoC4ILviUT6d4sJFIEnKyous6rVCD4LMVRvWoDfQkpEEUGkUPoIcebh0a7Hmybw0UggBQ-nZVIymUUYwRzCDNwBRQSK3U62dJa5sp5rO8qF7HsvBs59aeG8N_TN6ZvP_OU4pt2lOg94_J-1LaTHW7BH_yasPzSDmnzXRMwbT4lH-49qcGLyu_AwAA___Q93AS) has great picks for every mom on your list, and a few you'll want to keep for yourself. No judgment. Jimmy Kimmel and President Trump are feuding again. But how far back does this actually go, and how did it start? What happened when Trump was first booked on Kimmel's show? And what roles are ABC, the FCC, and major news affiliates playing? It's a story nearly a decade in the making, and host Ayla Brown breaks down the entire feud, what started it, what they have said, and where it stands in today's episode of _The Flyover Podcast_. [Listen here](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykzz9y6yAQgPHTiM6aZfkjv4LiNe6cNiWDxK5NgsCDsBXdPpNcIQf4vpnf-9VfQ8qp3N7CSq5z9YX2LVPv1PyNWjvWUCK1rbfn8hnrXp5c2SOgPYE-KfAxpHx4LaJjIiQlyMlpmoxWBqS4O6tNJCQAjlrBbHi2zBLNWTIi_zuL5H5uoBVIAG3Oo15IK2S5MNgZ7TxooJh6beNHTaXfifNRX9TGpa4iu3vvj21Q_we8DHhpNLdQ4piPAS-PGumrtyBFc_Gxp5zTZqdBw20NKf_2_U_ol8PvAAAA__-RJGue). We're excited to introduce you to a new partner today, [Superpower](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykzzFyhCAUANDTQLfOF76yW1Ck2W7TZlIxIB8li-IgrvH2meQKucCbeR8P87AxxWV8tzPpGrJZ6NgS1UrFjFTKOdvFU9lq2Yenz8eyhxyMANFfAC8SjLcxnQa514FIkOSkW6VUh7KDlk_61jlA55S30vqbtH4IV8SbguCU6GTgUf9qgBJaAOyuDQ6EUoR2CNA70TuGQD7WXJqvHJc6UUhnflFphjzzpKda143JNybuTNy3faWy5oNKs36HJmYm7k-0n73nRfv1iCnFrVcMYZxtTH9G_Vf8pcVPAAAA__-NXW1I). And this time, we're not just talking about it, we're signing up. Several members of our team, including our founder, are currently undergoing testing to get a clearer picture of their health.

## Supreme Court Tosses Louisiana Voting Map
The Supreme Court on Wednesday [struck down Louisiana's House map](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLHOozAQhJ_GdI6MMZAULq6hy7VXIsdew-aMF9lLIt7-xL3C34000qeZ789zfjpMmJffbgPLkeYM35qAGcq8QCnn5nKAUrkc_m-gbz4ixVkrPUhlZKfm4DCds2mCjQAaugZsO45jb7petc1qg1Ewuvt4DyYMRrfBPHzoXRzCa1Dw0A3ai6ZMp1qlTH-_GQ-m07H1UQ0vPbyEURCQqdzehJlXiOmkD5Sbp61JdmXeq-h-CT0JPeVzp8pXJfR0gYWelLnyQ-jpqPL6J_RUj73ABtLTUVgy1QpVJjqwostOrnRUkJvbJWa5uTcV-SHGvMiCy8pVOs8ygMeKlIWemmLD_sWUsA6jMGrZHKb_A_lHVj9W_wsAAP__BHmNZg) by a 6-3 vote, clearing a path for GOP redistricting gains across the South. Louisiana had been forced by a federal judge in 2024 to add a second majority-black district under the Voting Rights Act. The Trump administration challenged it as an [unconstitutional racial gerrymander](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0D2u4yAUxfHV4I4I8MUfBcU07jLtlBaGi80MhgiuE2X3o7y3hFf_pHOk_5_7ercxxbz_ticaCmXN-GoJibCuO9b6Pm32WBvVy_3z5ZWvUMKqhBq4AN6L1duY3it03gREhX2HRo7jqKHXQnaHEVuAYYYBvHYqTJOepJztLMGDlNMsu2g-awJ6IYUAPd3AIfQqSBfEsKlhYyDQRyr19rfETAeG9C5PrDdXzi6Zg-jRWP-LqYWphQ48YkofY2qpuF_JUiyZqcWVqxLfLFHCxtSiJw3jKHi7HhVP5N_-LBTzzmvcD2rcOmJq6arxj1dMKbZhZCD208avi45-1Oxp1P8AAAD__6JJgMY), and the Court on Wednesday agreed, despite the three liberal justices saying it would demolish the impact of the Voting Rights Act. The decision arrives during a redistricting war. Virginia's Supreme Court on Tuesday let stand [an order blocking certification](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOszAQhJ8GOqPFdoC_cPE3dLn2SuTYa7J3xkZmiZW3PyW6N7hyNNLom-_zulwtRUrrh93QcMhLwnpEZMayrFjKc7PJYzm4nO7b55rOkMMiQQ4CtFCweEvxuejWm4AoUbVo-nEcL1pdoG_vxgccFd4kDOM_O02TAqcGxBFBT4OzU0vmtQZaQQ-gL1OnHWolQ-8CDDc53BoN6Ilz6b4yJb5jiM_8wNK5vLXR3Jn3o1H_Gzk3cq61dpUf77KR8-tNI-eYnY3iNxT0dHAhx5RWUTBgweTPTURbj5NYnLu3jMLuhaKQk3jxtcX4vVKMdAxjo2HdLMU3Af9J28PInwAAAP__mUmDcw) of a Democrat-favored map approved by voters last week. And in Florida, Gov. Ron DeSantis [unveiled a new map](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGSpCAURb9GMyzE12pCsIlZb7qhRcPDfjvIswCl---nen5h4lt165zz777eDQWK21-zoy6e14g1BywF07phSu_dRIcpl3TaL8c1np79qqQahQQxyNUZCu8VWqc9osKhRd1P03SD4Sb79qnVMDuHM4KcZwPjODuQoEBZnCZpRmxJf94kDLKXEm5zBxZhUL63Xo4PNT4akOiocOr-M8XyRB_efGHqLO9t0M9SjtwMfxq1NGqptXaeXx-Lz96o5eBAhWxu1JI4CofZxEJZnPFCCllErMIHTuSMsBy3hDkTRxPEbg5R-QxObHSh2PgQ-CrJCM9nEhlNyW3S7qgUAuVxakBuu6HwA1Z-VfPS6jsAAP__aEiNkg) Monday that could net Republicans four additional House seats.
## Fed Holds Rates Steady at Powell's Last Meeting
The Federal Reserve on Wednesday [held rates steady](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOpDAQRL_GZEaNbWAIHFxCNpdeiIzdHvrW2CPTM2j-fsX-wmYlleqV9P7dl7ujRPnx1-1oOZYl43kkZMa6PLDWz-5ywHpwffmvUM78iiUuCtQgwUgNS3CUPotpgo2ICnWDthvHsTe6h67Z7OSM8UGP3k--G9DcAkTfx6kDXG9-VQ3ZiwZGQwdg-ltrPBqtYucjDKsaVmEAA3Gp7f9CmTeM6VPeWFtf9ibZjfl5CP1HqFmo-TzP1ufVX6VQ84UWagZz5UmoOWKQlBkrHiyrY5QBPR1UsnTPSklei3bjPTXVhudJKdExjMLAY3eUfj75V6LeVn0HAAD__0fGe-o) at 3.5%-3.75% in Chair Jerome Powell's final meeting, with four officials dissenting, the most since October 1992. Hours earlier, the Senate Banking Committee voted 13-11 to [advance Kevin Warsh's nomination](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLuu2zAQRL9G6igsH5bkQkUadTdtSoGX3LUY82GQawn6-8BB_iDdFDODg_Pra_uyIYb8-GkTLkxly3i2iMxYtwfWeiWbPdbG9e2evpz5TYU2BWoUYISGzdsQr830fiFEhbrHRU7TdDP6BrLfF-NpJrhbnO2IdyIAnCcHd5DWK6nnPiyfNzAaJIC5zYNxaLQi6QjGbzV-dwbQBy51-F1C5h0pXuXAOriS-rjszK_W6R-dWju1Usg2Oxwuu5fyaXRqRVdySVenVls5uIidWhtmyyhcSSkw4ydlCjU18cQjZHHa2nbRkJt4vwS9YxT_JkdhFFSqyHgKQi_cbkMV0shRGq3NsHOKfV386wwxhjZOnYFHsiH-Beb_snws6k8AAAD__5eUlFs) as Powell's successor to the full Senate. Sen. Thom Tillis, R-N.C., [dropped his opposition](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL3OpCAUQJ9GO8wV8a-g2MZutt3SIFz07iAYYGTm7Tezr_D1Jycn589jfShy5Pff6kSZbVg9luQwZ4zrjjF-TuUNxpTjSz9NKP5lg1058IGBYB2sRpH7rKI20iJy7GqU7TiOveh6aOtDDqitaedJw6y3TU9ge5hgHvue49yKrib5tYHooAUQ_dQIjaLjttUWho0PWyUADeUQm7-BfD7Quk-4MTY6nLWTR85XqrpfFV8qvpRSGhve2yuRx5S-TMWXKzjKpFPFlyfe5FlRMR3sDDcmFjyylPFi2oWEkW2ow0l-Zx7fmVk0TB-KYh2luQo5R2kYKwH7qcj9b8g_GndL_i8AAP__GyKFbA) after the Justice Department closed its probe into Powell last Friday. Powell's chairmanship ends May 15, but it's unclear how long he'll stay on as a Fed governor. That term runs through January 2028.
## NASA Chief: Make Pluto a Planet Again
NASA Administrator Jared Isaacman [told a Senate panel](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLtu5CAUhp_G7s4IA_ZsCopt3GXbLa0zcDAn4WIBM5bffpVo3yD1f9Gn7-_79o4cOe9_MJHpvmyZzhapd6rbTrVeCbOj2np92k9Xzvz0xW9SyAWEBiU2hxyvTY_OeCJJaiQz3e_3WatZTGMwdpmtXpAeGidy6JUjcn6exNvbrAj1yObrTWglJiH0_OumLWkl_WS9WB5yeQxakONe6u2jcO6BfLzKi-rNljRGE3o_2qB-D3Id5Hqe560daOkrHeSKrdeSS7oGuR7x2csg14wNwQYmDx9YyQE3RJswQ8OrQaAGnvfQOe_gS4XvHTBgghfVC9LTBuAMPRBYTAcUDwk_6X8R4YiYqQPuyHmsxh0nx8htuQ9a7Ak5fqP3H_l-GfkvAAD__7CqmbY) Tuesday he wants to "make Pluto a planet again," and is preparing papers to revisit the dwarf planet ruling. The remark came at the end of a budget hearing, when Sen. Jerry Moran, R-Kan., asked about Pluto. Its discoverer, Clyde Tombaugh, was a [self-taught Kansas farm boy](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L1u5CAUxfGnsTssDPhjCorVrtzNKkWklNa1udg3wTACPBZvH01eIf3R70j_j_t8B3Lkt_9woM42zB6v5DBnjPOGMZYDvMGYcjzXLxMuf9pgZ8FFz7hiks8GyJVZ1UZbRIGyRt0Ow9Ap2fG23nXLlRxXlAt0it8UttDL8QYAwqIBHGrSL40ryVvOVTc2akUlhW1Xy_tF9EulOBrKITafgXze0boSnhibNRy103vOj1TJP5WYKjFd19UskTJ4Tyu8JpWYcjBQGHm2U8ohlkpMEy7xhFhYO7K_rhhk7-FY4Nx29o_S-vITe3NnDnXU5nGRc5T6oVJ8O4Dcz3f-VbCnFt8BAAD__9gPgfw). The International Astronomical Union [demoted Pluto in 2006](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD2SpCAYQE-DGRYCih0QbGLWm25o0fKh7PBjwdda3H6q5wpzgPfq1fv3XJ_GB5_2vyaCRpfXBHcNgAhl3aGUFk2yUCqW9_Zl853eLruVMz5RJqlgqzU-tFV2VjsADqIDPSilRilGNnSHVptRm1WjFTN_wOwmCeNjFlIZYKNgrvP6Y2NSsIExOc693EAK7obNsenFpxeRDKzHXPr_2Sc8wIWWLyj9lmMX9IF4ViL-EL4Qvtz33Ye89Xu-CF_ggtKsaTS2ilA8VMIXU7HklGMjfPEI8UMdjfpKz_DGTFOmIacdCjX0DCYBEr50Rdvz9iH4Oiki2R6NDz8F-Kttl-bfAQAA__-HPYOP), ruling that planets must clear their orbits of other objects. Final say belongs to that body, not NASA. Tombaugh discovered the icy world in 1930 from [Lowell Observatory in Arizona](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L1urDAQxfGnMR1oGJuPLVzchm5vmxKBPV6cDBjZZglvH22k5AXS_3SO9H-7j_fJs98e_6eVdHZh3OhMTDlTHB8U47VOm6WYcjzMhw3ndrjgRgRsS1ClhNFOnq9RFVY7IiRZkK67rmuUbKAuFt2Y3rrZTUbNtZtdf4MeXN-DAbihRFV4_VoDJaEGUE1fKUNKoquNg3bGdhYKyPocYvUe_JYXcnyFJ8XKhLVgveS8JyH_CRwEDhxOYq7IHgIH65N5SYFDJqZkwk6ppM_Fzz4ngcPORw7lD7vKXyVwKKK2--mZfWo7oeCxTp6_P_OfQj01fgUAAP__AFt_Yg), the only American to ever discover a planet--if it is one.
* * *

On this day in 1789, was sworn in as the first U.S. president and delivered his inaugural speech at Federal Hall in New York City, establishing traditions that have largely remained unchanged for two centuries. Pluto was a planet for 76 years before astronomers demoted it in 2006. Now , as we report below. Planet or not? Reply to this email and let us know. Our has great picks for every mom on your list, and a few you'll want to keep for yourself. No judgment. Jimmy Kimmel and President Trump are feuding again. But how far back does this actually go, and how did it start? What happened when Trump was first booked on Kimmel's show? And what roles are ABC, the FCC, and major news affiliates playing? It's a story nearly a decade in the making, and host Ayla Brown breaks down the entire feud, what started it, what they have said, and where it stands in today's episode of The Flyover Podcast. . We're excited to introduce you to a new partner today, . And this time, we're not just talking about it, we're signing up. Several members of our team, including our founder, are currently undergoing testing to get a clearer picture of their health. | Supreme Court Tosses Louisiana Voting Map The Supreme Court on Wednesday by a 6-3 vote, clearing a path for GOP redistricting gains across the South. Louisiana had been forced by a federal judge in 2024 to add a second majority-black district under the Voting Rights Act. The Trump administration challenged it as an , and the Court on Wednesday agreed, despite the three liberal justices saying it would demolish the impact of the Voting Rights Act. The decision arrives during a redistricting war. Virginia's Supreme Court on Tuesday let stand of a Democrat-favored map approved by voters last week. And in Florida, Gov. Ron DeSantis Monday that could net Republicans four additional House seats. Fed Holds Rates Steady at Powell's Last Meeting The Federal Reserve on Wednesday at 3.5%-3.75% in Chair Jerome Powell's final meeting, with four officials dissenting, the most since October 1992. Hours earlier, the Senate Banking Committee voted 13-11 to as Powell's successor to the full Senate. Sen. Thom Tillis, R-N.C., after the Justice Department closed its probe into Powell last Friday. Powell's chairmanship ends May 15, but it's unclear how long he'll stay on as a Fed governor. That term runs through January 2028. NASA Chief: Make Pluto a Planet Again NASA Administrator Jared Isaacman Tuesday he wants to "make Pluto a planet again," and is preparing papers to revisit the dwarf planet ruling. The remark came at the end of a budget hearing, when Sen. Jerry Moran, R-Kan., asked about Pluto. Its discoverer, Clyde Tombaugh, was a . The International Astronomical Union , ruling that planets must clear their orbits of other objects. Final say belongs to that body, not NASA. Tombaugh discovered the icy world in 1930 from , the only American to ever discover a planet--if it is one. name: James O'Keefe
subject: The White House responded to our hidden camera election fraud footage.
body:
A man handed a homeless person a post-it note and a dollar bill on a sidewalk in Los Angeles. On the note was a name, an address, and a date of birth

| | | [](https://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyUkbuOnTAQhp_GdCBfMPgULiIhuk2bEg32ANbii3zJvn7EWaVKlXL--eaXPs2vj-0D3O3C-RM86lyPLZetXvh1uYpXbAUzlhSDRVtj3DjlU0_HXtCHY53V1lhgpkPN5nmWo6RSdZemQgimDi4ZfUlKj5lZPioGMIndTAo6p58qOgrKqKByHNSslDQWJ3u8JHvtZKRwY65DxtT22xkIFcrnEbPBwUTf3fqqNRUifhC-Er4WNC3jAAFtrA9B-Bo_EQ_0aB2cObb0RP7sbcQSan9BShh6v_cpJiBibdVvJbZskIjlH5Dw6QGetuaJWN5H35kBn8CdgYjlW4urv5sYKoZKxJLrQfgEPrb3yGWXtU1f7r5dmWYy0tODu99q9f8f8VvzPwEAAP__ZNqZKg "https://secure.anedot.com/okeefemediagroup/omg-doesnt-happen-mb-popa?utm_source=omg-doesnt-happen&utm_medium=popa&utm_campaign=20260428&utm_content=rtf&amount=25")

---
| Dear Patriot,
A man handed a homeless person a post-it note and a dollar bill on a sidewalk in Los Angeles. On the note was a name, an address, and a date of birth — **a real voter's identity.** “Sign his name,” the man said. “Just write what I tell you to write.”**[**We filmed the whole thing.**](https://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyUkbuOnTAQhp_GdCBfMPgULiIhuk2bEg32ANbii3zJvn7EWaVKlXL--eaXPs2vj-0D3O3C-RM86lyPLZetXvh1uYpXbAUzlhSDRVtj3DjlU0_HXtCHY53V1lhgpkPN5nmWo6RSdZemQgimDi4ZfUlKj5lZPioGMIndTAo6p58qOgrKqKByHNSslDQWJ3u8JHvtZKRwY65DxtT22xkIFcrnEbPBwUTf3fqqNRUifhC-Er4WNC3jAAFtrA9B-Bo_EQ_0aB2cObb0RP7sbcQSan9BShh6v_cpJiBibdVvJbZskIjlH5Dw6QGetuaJWN5H35kBn8CdgYjlW4urv5sYKoZKxJLrQfgEPrb3yGWXtU1f7r5dmWYy0tODu99q9f8f8VvzPwEAAP__ZNqZKg)

**[****](https://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyUkbuOnTAQhp_GdCBfMPgULiIhuk2bEg32ANbii3zJvn7EWaVKlXL--eaXPs2vj-0D3O3C-RM86lyPLZetXvh1uYpXbAUzlhSDRVtj3DjlU0_HXtCHY53V1lhgpkPN5nmWo6RSdZemQgimDi4ZfUlKj5lZPioGMIndTAo6p58qOgrKqKByHNSslDQWJ3u8JHvtZKRwY65DxtT22xkIFcrnEbPBwUTf3fqqNRUifhC-Er4WNC3jAAFtrA9B-Bo_EQ_0aB2cObb0RP7sbcQSan9BShh6v_cpJiBibdVvJbZskIjlH5Dw6QGetuaJWN5H35kBn8CdgYjlW4urv5sYKoZKxJLrQfgEPrb3yGWXtU1f7r5dmWYy0tODu99q9f8f8VvzPwEAAP__ZNqZKg)What you're about to see is the most explosive hidden-camera footage my team has ever captured. Not speculation. Not anonymous sources.**Actual election crimes committed on camera — in broad daylight — on the streets of Los Angeles.** Over the course of several days, my undercover journalists documented petition circulators handing post-it notes with real voters' names and addresses to homeless individuals, paying them cash — one to three dollars per signature — and instructing them to forge those voters' signatures on official petitions and voter registration forms.We captured it **twenty-eight times.** That's twenty-eight documented instances in just a few days of filming. Which means across Los Angeles County, this is happening **tens of thousands of times.**[****](https://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyUkbuOnTAQhp_GdCBfMPgULiIhuk2bEg32ANbii3zJvn7EWaVKlXL--eaXPs2vj-0D3O3C-RM86lyPLZetXvh1uYpXbAUzlhSDRVtj3DjlU0_HXtCHY53V1lhgpkPN5nmWo6RSdZemQgimDi4ZfUlKj5lZPioGMIndTAo6p58qOgrKqKByHNSslDQWJ3u8JHvtZKRwY65DxtT22xkIFcrnEbPBwUTf3fqqNRUifhC-Er4WNC3jAAFtrA9B-Bo_EQ_0aB2cObb0RP7sbcQSan9BShh6v_cpJiBibdVvJbZskIjlH5Dw6QGetuaJWN5H35kBn8CdgYjlW4urv5sYKoZKxJLrQfgEPrb3yGWXtU1f7r5dmWYy0tODu99q9f8f8VvzPwEAAP__ZNqZKg "https://secure.anedot.com/okeefemediagroup/omg-doesnt-happen-mb-popa?utm_source=omg-doesnt-happen&utm_medium=popa&utm_campaign=20260428&utm_content=rtf&amount=25")****| [▶ WATCH THE HIDDEN-CAMERA FOOTAGE AND CHIP IN $35](https://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyUkbuOnTAQhp_GdCBfMPgULiIhuk2bEg32ANbii3zJvn7EWaVKlXL--eaXPs2vj-0D3O3C-RM86lyPLZetXvh1uYpXbAUzlhSDRVtj3DjlU0_HXtCHY53V1lhgpkPN5nmWo6RSdZemQgimDi4ZfUlKj5lZPioGMIndTAo6p58qOgrKqKByHNSslDQWJ3u8JHvtZKRwY65DxtT22xkIFcrnEbPBwUTf3fqqNRUifhC-Er4WNC3jAAFtrA9B-Bo_EQ_0aB2cObb0RP7sbcQSan9BShh6v_cpJiBibdVvJbZskIjlH5Dw6QGetuaJWN5H35kBn8CdgYjlW4urv5sYKoZKxJLrQfgEPrb3yGWXtU1f7r5dmWYy0tODu99q9f8f8VvzPwEAAP__ZNqZKg "https://secure.anedot.com/okeefemediagroup/omg-doesnt-happen-mb-popa?utm_source=omg-doesnt-happen&utm_medium=popa&utm_campaign=20260428&utm_content=rtf&amount=25")
---
Let me walk you through what our cameras caught.
A voter named Vicky Walker. A voter named Paulson. A voter named Joseph Albright. Real people. Real identities. In each case, a petition coordinator handed a homeless person a sticky note bearing that voter's information and told them to sign as if they were that person.
One coordinator was caught on camera admitting they get paid seven to ten dollars per signature. They're turning around and paying homeless people a fraction of that — a dollar, sometimes three — to commit federal crimes on their behalf.
Let me be clear about what we're talking about: **it is a federal crime to provide false information on a voter registration form. It is a federal crime to offer payment for voter registration.** What we documented is not a gray area. It is multiple felonies, exposed on hidden camera, happening systematically.
The New York Times told America this doesn't happen. Their Sunday edition dismissed election fraud concerns. **We just proved them wrong twenty-eight times on tape.**
And here's what happened next: we brought our footage to the White House. Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt called it “astounding.” NBC News covered it. The story is breaking through.
**But investigations like this are not free.**
Every dollar you give goes directly to fieldwork: $35 covers a day of undercover equipment costs. $50 covers the background research we do to identify real voters whose identities are being stolen. $100 funds a full day of field operations. $250 helps cover the legal costs of protecting our journalists when powerful people try to shut us down.
[****](https://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyUkbuOnTAQhp_GdCBfMPgULiIhuk2bEg32ANbii3zJvn7EWaVKlXL--eaXPs2vj-0D3O3C-RM86lyPLZetXvh1uYpXbAUzlhSDRVtj3DjlU0_HXtCHY53V1lhgpkPN5nmWo6RSdZemQgimDi4ZfUlKj5lZPioGMIndTAo6p58qOgrKqKByHNSslDQWJ3u8JHvtZKRwY65DxtT22xkIFcrnEbPBwUTf3fqqNRUifhC-Er4WNC3jAAFtrA9B-Bo_EQ_0aB2cObb0RP7sbcQSan9BShh6v_cpJiBibdVvJbZskIjlH5Dw6QGetuaJWN5H35kBn8CdgYjlW4urv5sYKoZKxJLrQfgEPrb3yGWXtU1f7r5dmWYy0tODu99q9f8f8VvzPwEAAP__ZNqZKg "https://secure.anedot.com/okeefemediagroup/omg-doesnt-happen-mb-popa?utm_source=omg-doesnt-happen&utm_medium=popa&utm_campaign=20260428&utm_content=rtf&amount=25")****
[▶ CHIP IN $50 TO KEEP OUR CAMERAS ROLLING](https://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyUkbuOnTAQhp_GdCBfMPgULiIhuk2bEg32ANbii3zJvn7EWaVKlXL--eaXPs2vj-0D3O3C-RM86lyPLZetXvh1uYpXbAUzlhSDRVtj3DjlU0_HXtCHY53V1lhgpkPN5nmWo6RSdZemQgimDi4ZfUlKj5lZPioGMIndTAo6p58qOgrKqKByHNSslDQWJ3u8JHvtZKRwY65DxtT22xkIFcrnEbPBwUTf3fqqNRUifhC-Er4WNC3jAAFtrA9B-Bo_EQ_0aB2cObb0RP7sbcQSan9BShh6v_cpJiBibdVvJbZskIjlH5Dw6QGetuaJWN5H35kBn8CdgYjlW4urv5sYKoZKxJLrQfgEPrb3yGWXtU1f7r5dmWYy0tODu99q9f8f8VvzPwEAAP__ZNqZKg "https://secure.anedot.com/okeefemediagroup/omg-doesnt-happen-mb-popa?utm_source=omg-doesnt-happen&utm_medium=popa&utm_campaign=20260428&utm_content=rtf&amount=25")
---
Think about what's at stake. If petition circulators can forge voter signatures by the tens of thousands in broad daylight — paying homeless people with cash and cigarettes to impersonate real voters — and the system does nothing about it, then your vote is being diluted. Your voice is being stolen.
The only reason we know about this is because my team was there with hidden cameras. **No one else was going to expose this.** Not the Times. Not local officials. Not the people getting paid seven dollars a signature to look the other way.
We did it. And we need your help to keep doing it.
Can I count on you today?
[****](https://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyUkbuOnTAQhp_GdCBfMPgULiIhuk2bEg32ANbii3zJvn7EWaVKlXL--eaXPs2vj-0D3O3C-RM86lyPLZetXvh1uYpXbAUzlhSDRVtj3DjlU0_HXtCHY53V1lhgpkPN5nmWo6RSdZemQgimDi4ZfUlKj5lZPioGMIndTAo6p58qOgrKqKByHNSslDQWJ3u8JHvtZKRwY65DxtT22xkIFcrnEbPBwUTf3fqqNRUifhC-Er4WNC3jAAFtrA9B-Bo_EQ_0aB2cObb0RP7sbcQSan9BShh6v_cpJiBibdVvJbZskIjlH5Dw6QGetuaJWN5H35kBn8CdgYjlW4urv5sYKoZKxJLrQfgEPrb3yGWXtU1f7r5dmWYy0tODu99q9f8f8VvzPwEAAP__ZNqZKg "https://secure.anedot.com/okeefemediagroup/omg-doesnt-happen-mb-popa?utm_source=omg-doesnt-happen&utm_medium=popa&utm_campaign=20260428&utm_content=rtf&amount=25")****
[▶ YES — RUSH $100 TO FUND THE NEXT INVESTIGATION](https://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyUkbuOnTAQhp_GdCBfMPgULiIhuk2bEg32ANbii3zJvn7EWaVKlXL--eaXPs2vj-0D3O3C-RM86lyPLZetXvh1uYpXbAUzlhSDRVtj3DjlU0_HXtCHY53V1lhgpkPN5nmWo6RSdZemQgimDi4ZfUlKj5lZPioGMIndTAo6p58qOgrKqKByHNSslDQWJ3u8JHvtZKRwY65DxtT22xkIFcrnEbPBwUTf3fqqNRUifhC-Er4WNC3jAAFtrA9B-Bo_EQ_0aB2cObb0RP7sbcQSan9BShh6v_cpJiBibdVvJbZskIjlH5Dw6QGetuaJWN5H35kBn8CdgYjlW4urv5sYKoZKxJLrQfgEPrb3yGWXtU1f7r5dmWYy0tODu99q9f8f8VvzPwEAAP__ZNqZKg "https://secure.anedot.com/okeefemediagroup/omg-doesnt-happen-mb-popa?utm_source=omg-doesnt-happen&utm_medium=popa&utm_campaign=20260428&utm_content=rtf&amount=25")
---

In Truth,
James O'Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

**P.S.** They said election fraud doesn't happen. We filmed it twenty-eight times in a matter of days — real voters' identities, forged by strangers for a dollar a signature. The White House has seen it. NBC has covered it. But the investigation isn't over. **Your gift of $35, $50, or $100 today puts our cameras back on the street tomorrow.**

Let me be clear about what we're talking about: it is a federal crime to provide false information on a voter registration form. It is a federal crime to offer payment for voter registration. What we documented is not a gray area. It is multiple felonies, exposed on hidden camera, happening systematically. The New York Times told America this doesn't happen. Their Sunday edition dismissed election fraud concerns. We just proved them wrong twenty-eight times on tape. And here's what happened next: we brought our footage to the White House. Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt called it “astounding.” NBC News covered it. The story is breaking through. But investigations like this are not free. Every dollar you give goes directly to fieldwork: $35 covers a day of undercover equipment costs. $50 covers the background research we do to identify real voters whose identities are being stolen. $100 funds a full day of field operations. $250 helps cover the legal costs of protecting our journalists when powerful people try to shut us down. "" "" Think about what's at stake. If petition circulators can forge voter signatures by the tens of thousands in broad daylight — paying homeless people with cash and cigarettes to impersonate real voters — and the system does nothing about it, then your vote is being diluted. Your voice is being stolen. The only reason we know about this is because my team was there with hidden cameras. No one else was going to expose this. Not the Times. Not local officials. Not the people getting paid seven dollars a signature to look the other way. We did it. And we need your help to keep doing it. Can I count on you today? "" "" In Truth, James O'Keefe Founder and CEO O'Keefe Media Group P.S. They said election fraud doesn't happen. We filmed it twenty-eight times in a matter of days — real voters' identities, forged by strangers for a dollar a signature. The White House has seen it. NBC has covered it. But the investigation isn't over. Your gift of $35, $50, or $100 today puts our cameras back on the street tomorrow. ""** "" Pop Acta Media | Republican Task Force PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

body:
I approached this interview the same way I’ve approached this campaign, speaking directly about what I’ve actually done.
[](https://daniellebethell.cmail20.com/t/y-l-aklikul-hhlrhljhit-r/) Friends,I recently sat down with KATU as part of their "Know Your Candidates" series, where each of us was asked the same set of questions about our background, the challenges facing Oregon, and how we would lead.[You can read the full interview here.](https://daniellebethell.cmail20.com/t/y-l-aklikul-hhlrhljhit-y/)We're now less than three weeks from Election Day, and this is the stretch where campaigns either break through or fall behind.If you've been following this race and believe in what we're building, I need your help right now. [Please consider making a contribution today](https://daniellebethell.cmail20.com/t/y-l-aklikul-hhlrhljhit-j/). We're working to raise $25,000 this week to help expand our voter contact efforts between now and Election Day. [DONATE TODAY](https://daniellebethell.cmail20.com/t/y-l-aklikul-hhlrhljhit-t/) [](https://daniellebethell.cmail20.com/t/y-l-aklikul-hhlrhljhit-i/) I approached this interview the same way I've approached this campaign, speaking directly about what I've actually done and how I would take that experience into the governor's office.As a Marion County Commissioner, I've spent the last several years working through the issues people are dealing with right now, mental health, addiction, homelessness, public safety, and affordability. That work requires more than ideas. It requires follow-through, coordination, and a willingness to take responsibility for outcomes.That's why I've been clear that I'm not stepping into something new. I'm asking for a promotion in the same line of work.In these final weeks, it comes down to reaching voters and staying in front of them while they're making their decisions.Your support makes that possible. [Can You Chip In Now?](https://daniellebethell.cmail20.com/t/y-l-aklikul-hhlrhljhit-d/) If you've already contributed, thank you. [If you're able to give again](https://daniellebethell.cmail20.com/t/y-l-aklikul-hhlrhljhit-h/), it helps us keep building the momentum we need to finish strong.And if nothing else, take a few minutes to read the interview and share it with someone who's still deciding.We're close, and I'm grateful to have you in this with me.Danielle Bethell
Republican for GovernorP.S. Every dollar in these final weeks goes directly toward reaching voters before May 19. [If you can, please chip in here.](https://daniellebethell.cmail20.com/t/y-l-aklikul-hhlrhljhit-k/) [](https://daniellebethell.cmail20.com/t/y-l-aklikul-hhlrhljhit-x/)[](https://daniellebethell.cmail20.com/t/y-l-aklikul-hhlrhljhit-m/)[](https://daniellebethell.cmail20.com/t/y-l-aklikul-hhlrhljhit-c/)[](https://daniellebethell.cmail20.com/t/y-l-aklikul-hhlrhljhit-q/) | [ Share ](https://daniellebethell.cmail20.com/t/y-fb-aklikul-hhlrhljhit-a/) | [ Tweet ](https://daniellebethell.cmail20.com/t/y-tw-aklikul-hhlrhljhit-f/) | [ Share ](https://daniellebethell.cmail20.com/t/y-li-aklikul-hhlrhljhit-z/) | [ Forward ](https://daniellebethell.forwardtomyfriend.com/y-hhlrhljhit-E19159AE-aklikul-l-v)
